category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Eswatini.

title.en: China-to-Eswatini EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入埃斯瓦蒂尼：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入埃斯瓦蒂尼：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Eswatini SWASA conformity expectations, ESERA and Eswatini Electricity Company grid coordination, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector practice, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与埃斯瓦蒂尼SWASA合格评定预期、ESERA及埃斯瓦蒂尼电力公司并网协调、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口实践、IEC 61000 EMC证据，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與埃斯瓦蒂尼SWASA合格評定預期、ESERA及埃斯瓦蒂尼電力公司併網協調、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口實務、IEC 61000 EMC證據，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Eswatini, the practical gates are SWASA conformity review, ESERA and Eswatini Electricity Company coordination for grid-connected installations, IEC-family safety and EMC evidence, and IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector compatibility. Eswatini uses a 230/400 V, 50 Hz supply and is a landlocked Southern African SADC and SACU market that imports power from South Africa; charging infrastructure is likely to follow South-African IEC Type 2 / CCS2 practice. China-only GB/T 20234 connectors and GB/T 27930 DC communication are physically and protocol-incompatible with that IEC ecosystem.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入埃斯瓦蒂尼时，实务门槛包括SWASA合格评定审查、并网安装所需的ESERA及埃斯瓦蒂尼电力公司协调、IEC体系安全及EMC证据，以及IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口兼容性。埃斯瓦蒂尼采用230/400 V、50 Hz供电，是位于南部非洲的内陆SADC和SACU市场，并从南非进口电力；充电基础设施很可能沿用南非IEC Type 2 / CCS2实践。仅支持中国GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930直流通信的产品与该IEC生态在物理和协议层面不兼容。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入埃斯瓦蒂尼時，實務門檻包括SWASA合格評定審查、併網安裝所需的ESERA及埃斯瓦蒂尼電力公司協調、IEC體系安全及EMC證據，以及IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口兼容性。埃斯瓦蒂尼採用230/400 V、50 Hz供電，是位於南部非洲的內陸SADC和SACU市場，並從南非進口電力；充電基礎設施很可能沿用南非IEC Type 2 / CCS2實務。僅支持中國GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930直流通訊的產品與該IEC生態在物理和協議層面不兼容。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SWASA scope determination, ESERA approval, Eswatini Electricity Company grid-connection approval, customs determination, electrical-installation design, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, and installers should verify current Eswatini conformity assessment, grid-connection, IEC standard edition, and installation requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SWASA适用范围裁定、ESERA批准、埃斯瓦蒂尼电力公司并网批准、海关裁定、电气安装设计或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行埃斯瓦蒂尼合格评定、并网接入、IEC标准版本及安装要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SWASA適用範圍裁定、ESERA批准、埃斯瓦蒂尼電力公司併網批准、海關裁定、電氣安裝設計或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行埃斯瓦蒂尼合格評定、併網接入、IEC標準版本及安裝要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
